title: SBA EIDL Deferment Period is Ending:  Are You Ready?
summary: The deferment period for SBA Economic Injury Disaster Loans (EIDL) is coming to a close soon, which means many businesses must now begin making loan payments. To learn how to create an account at pay.gov , to begin making payments or to get contact info download this PDF slideshow that will walk you...

title: Backyard Buoys Awarded $4.98M Cooperative Agreement with National Science Foundation
summary: Backyard Buoys empowers Indigenous and other coastal communities in the Pacific Northwest, Alaska, and the Pacific Islands to collect, steward, and use wave data that complements their existing knowledge to support their blue economy: maritime activities, food security, and coastal hazard protection...
